query: 规模最大的前一百只基金里，持仓贵州茅台最多的十只基金是谁

args.sql: WITH latest_date AS (SELECT MAX(date) AS max_date FROM fund_size), top100 AS (SELECT fund_code, fund_name FROM fund_size WHERE date = (SELECT max_date FROM latest_date) ORDER BY fund_size DESC LIMIT 100), moutai AS (SELECT fund_code, holding_value FROM fund_holding WHERE date = (SELECT max_date FROM latest_date) AND stock_name = '贵州茅台') SELECT t.fund_code AS 基金代码, t.fund_name AS 基金名称, m.holding_value AS 持有贵州茅台市值 FROM top100 t JOIN moutai m ON t.fund_code = m.fund_code ORDER BY m.holding_value DESC LIMIT 10;

plan.rationale: 取出最新规模的TOP100基金，关联同期持仓贵州茅台的数据，按持有市值降序取前10
